people.name: Guodong Zhang
people.one_liner: xAI co-founder. Led Grok Code & Grok Imagine. Departed xAI March 2026.

people.name: Vahid Kazemi
people.one_liner: Former xAI ML PhD. Left Feb 2026. Explicitly starting something new.
people.spike_signal: DEPARTED xAI. Direct quote: all AI labs building same thing, boring. Active founder.

people.name: Roland Gavrilescu
people.one_liner: Former xAI engineer. Left Nov 2025. Re-forming team with xAI alumni.

people.name: Tianle Li

people.spike_signal: Built THE LLM eval platform + shipped frontier post-training. Rare eval+shipping combo.

people.name: Jathushan Rajasegaran
people.one_liner: Malik PhD. 2300+ citations. xAI video team. Co-author CVPR+ICCV 2025. Sri Lankan.
people.spike_signal: 2300+ cites. Malik PhD. At xAI during exodus. If departs = strong co-founding signal.

people.name: Sehoon Kim

people.name: Shubham Goel
people.one_liner: Malik PhD. IIT Bombay. 3D reconstruction. At xAI. Indian-origin.

people.one_liner: PhD Berkeley (Abbeel + Malik). IIT Delhi. Robot learning from videos.
people.spike_signal: IIT Delhi + dual Abbeel+Malik PhD. Robot learning. Indian.

people.name: Anastasios Angelopoulos
people.one_liner: Postdoc Berkeley (Ion Stoica). Science paper. PhD under Jordan + Malik. Incoming Stanford faculty.
people.spike_signal: Published in Science. Jordan+Malik+Stoica lineage. Conformal prediction pioneer.

people.name: Ethan He
people.one_liner: Co-recruited from NVIDIA Cosmos to xAI. Led Cosmos development. CMU MS. Still at xAI.
people.spike_signal: Led NVIDIA Cosmos. If departs xAI = strongest Zeeshan co-founding signal.

people.name: Charlie Snell
people.one_liner: PhD Berkeley. First author of Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute (ICLR 2025 Oral, most-cited).
people.spike_signal: THE paper on test-time compute scaling. ICLR 2025 Oral. Dual lead of the paradigm.

people.name: Amrith Setlur
people.one_liner: PhD CMU. Co-first author on e3 with Matthew Yang. Closest collaborator.
people.spike_signal: Co-first author e3 (test-time compute). Most likely co-founder if Yang starts something. Indian.

people.name: Keller Jordan
people.one_liner: Independent researcher, Berkeley. Muon co-creator. NanoGPT speedrunning. Karpathy endorsed.
people.spike_signal: Created Muon optimizer. NanoGPT pioneer. Endorsed by Karpathy. Strong founder archetype.

people.name: Jeremy Bernstein
people.one_liner: ML researcher SF. Caltech PhD. Co-created modular duality theory. Building Modula library.

people.name: Karan Dalal
people.one_liner: Stanford/Berkeley. Lead author TTT video paper. Core TTT group.
